articles.summary: Key vote due on EU-US deal amid tariff warning - World - Chinadaily. EU-US deal amid tariff warning By JONATHAN POWELL in London | China Daily Global | Updated: 2026-03-25 09:16 Share Share - WeChat --> CLOSE European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen (left) and Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese exchange signed agreements in Canberra on Tuesday.
